title: A document card with a vivid event-header band at the top and a ruled governed-scope body below. The `on EventName` header governs everything beneath it — nothing in the body fires unless the declared event was received. The header IS the gate; the body is the governed scope. This roots the icon in the actual editing experience of a .precept file.
conceptualBridge: The on-header means Precept's contract is an event-governed scope because the bright header band is the declaration gate — the body below exists only because that event was declared above it.
decision: Rejected: avg 3.81 below threshold — the card-with-colored-header pattern is colonized by Trello, Jira, and every Kanban tool; body content lines disappear at 32px leaving just a plain colored-header card; no clear distinction from generic task-management icons.
